customization.title: Customize Your Experience
customization.nameLabel: What should the assistant call you?
customization.occupationLabel: What is your professional or academic field?
customization.traitsLabel: What traits do you prefer in the assistant?
customization.traitsPlaceholder: Type a trait and press Enter...
customization.otherLabel: Is there anything else the assistant should know about you?
customization.otherPlaceholder: Interests, values, or preferences to consider

subscription.accessAllModelsDesc: Get access to our complete collection of models, including Claude, o3-mini-high and many more!
subscription.generousLimitsDesc: Get {standard} standard credits monthly, plus {premium} premium credits* monthly.
subscription.prioritySupportDesc: Get faster responses and personalized assistance from the Syrian Zone team whenever you need help!
subscription.premiumCreditsNote: *Premium credits are used for premium models marked with a "gem" icon in the model selector. This includes, but is not limited to, Claude Sonnet models, GPT-5 (Reasoning), Grok 3/4, image generation models, and Gemini 2.5 Pro. Additional premium credits can be purchased separately for $8 per 100 credits.

payment.sendExactAmount: Send exactly {amount} SYP to ShamCash with the payment code
payment.instructionStep1: Open your ShamCash app or visit ShamCash.sy
payment.instructionStep2: Initiate a new transfer for the amount shown above
payment.instructionStep3: In the transfer note/memo field, enter exactly: {code}
payment.instructionStep4: Complete the transfer. Your account will be upgraded automatically within seconds
payment.upgradedToProSuccessfully: You've been upgraded to Pro. Enjoy your new limits!
payment.paymentExpiredDesc: This payment link has expired. Please return to the subscription page to create a new one.

usage.title: Message Usage
usage.toolUsageNote: Each tool usage (such as web search) during a response consumes additional credits. Models may not always use enabled tools.

history.title: Chat History
history.description: Manage your previous conversations, export data, or restore them.
history.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} conversation(s)?

models.title: Available Models
models.description: Explore the AI models available to you and their capabilities.

apiKeys.title: Bring Your Own Keys (BYOK)
apiKeys.description: Enter your own API keys to use models directly from providers. Keys are encrypted and stored securely.
apiKeys.securityDescription: When using your own key, usage costs will be charged directly to your provider account (like OpenRouter), and no credits will be deducted from your Syrian Zone plan except for minimal interface fees if applicable.
apiKeys.openrouterDesc: Preferred option for accessing all models at cost price.
apiKeys.openaiDesc: For direct access to GPT-4o and o1 models.
apiKeys.anthropicDesc: For access to Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Opus models.
apiKeys.googleDesc: For access to Gemini 1.5 Pro and Flash models.
apiKeys.deepseekDesc: Powerful models at very competitive prices.
apiKeys.openrouterNote: If you set up an OpenRouter key, it will automatically be used for all models supported by them. You can always delete the key to use your plan's included credits.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: Manage files you've uploaded to the assistant.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We're here to help. Send us your inquiry or feedback.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Write the details of your message here...
contact.sentSuccess: Your message was sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.

chat.inputPlaceholder: How can I help you today?
chat.inputHint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line
chat.lowCreditsMsg: You have {count} {type} remaining. Please renew your subscription soon.
chat.confirmDeleteChat: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

suggestions.createOnlineStore: How to create an online store?

upgrade.proFeatureDesc: This feature is only available to Pro subscribers. Upgrade to access search, attachments, and more.
